# Usage Example:

**Query with Page and Entity:**
> Use blazor-list-delete-generator skill to implement delete operations with confirmation dialogs and Playwright UI tests for the Request list page.
**带页面和实体的提问：**
> 使用 blazor-list-delete-generator skill，为 Request 列表页面实现删除操作，包含确认对话框和 Playwright UI 测试。
